payload.tactic: have hB : 0%r <= BRA.big (fun (n0 : nonce) => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \notin SplitC2.I2.RO.m{hr}) (fun (n0 : nonce) => (size (filter (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`1 = n0) Mem.lc{hr}))%r) (undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})) by apply StdBigop.Bigreal.sumr_ge0 => a _ /=; smt(size_ge0).
